mapper.select:
SELECT 'emergencyControlOrganChart' AS title ,'/EmergencyControlOrganChart' AS route ,'emergencyControlOrganChartDesc' AS description , case when emergencyControlOrganChart.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_emergency_control_org_chart tecoc WHERE tecoc.comp_id = #{compId} AND tecoc.write_year = #{searchText} AND tecoc.confirm_yn = 'Y' ) as exist ) AS emergencyControlOrganChart UNION ALL SELECT 'emergencyControlTaskAsgmt' AS title ,'/EmergencyControlTaskAsgmt' AS route ,'emergencyControlTaskAsgmtDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN emergencyControlTaskAsgmt.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_emergency_control_task_asgmt tecta WHERE tecta.comp_id = #{compId} AND tecta.write_year = #{searchText} AND tecta.use_yn = 'Y' ) as exist ) AS emergencyControlTaskAsgmt UNION ALL SELECT 'emergencyResponseTraining' AS title ,'/EmergencyResponseTraining' AS route ,'emergencyResponseTrainingDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN emergencyResponseTraining.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_emergency_response_training_result t1 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info a ON a.target_type = t1.doc_type AND a.target_id = t1.write_year||t1.doc_no||t1.doc_seq AND a.param = 'writer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info b ON b.target_type = t1.doc_type AND b.target_id = t1.write_year||t1.doc_no||t1.doc_seq AND b.param = 'reviewer' WHERE t1.comp_id = #{compId} AND t1.write_year = #{searchText} AND t1.use_yn = 'Y' and a.signature is NOT NULL AND b.signature is NOT NULL ) as exist ) AS emergencyResponseTraining UNION ALL SELECT 'facilityEquipStatusTable' AS title ,'/facilityEquipStatusTable' AS route ,'facilityEquipStatusTableDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN facilityEquipStatusTable.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_facility_equipment_info tfei WHERE tfei.comp_id = #{compId} AND tfei.use_yn = 'Y'
) as exist ) AS facilityEquipStatusTable
